ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the exchange's website */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Fees charged by the exchange */,
  "supported_currencies" TEXT /* List of currencies supported by the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the currency */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the currency's website */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain used by the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the currency was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the currency's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "unix_timestamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the data entry */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote currency */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the currency pair */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the currency pair */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the currency pair */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the currency pair */,
  "volume_base" REAL /* Volume traded in the base currency */,
  "volume_quote" REAL /* Volume traded in the quote currency */,
  "time_frame_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time frame (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour, 1-day) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the market data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the market data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_time_frame_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_frame_id") REFERENCES time_frames ("time_frame_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_frames" (
  "time_frame_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time frame */,
  "time_frame_name" TEXT /* Name of the time frame (e.g., 1-minute, 1-hour, 1-day) */,
  "time_frame_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the time frame (e.g., 1 minute, 1 hour, 1 day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_frame_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "email_verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's email verification */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser and device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading pair */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base currency */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote currency */,
  "pair_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the trading pair (e.g., ETH/USD) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading pair was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trading pair's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_base_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_pairs_quote_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_pairs" (
  "exchange_pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange pair */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading pair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange pair was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the exchange pair's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_pair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_pairs_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_pairs_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES trading_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., RSI, MACD) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the technical indicator (e.g., momentum, trend) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the technical indicator was calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the technical indicator was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
